title: Consumer Information - Canada.ca
content:
## Consumer Information
This consumer information page provides easy access to a wealth of resources about your health and the surrounding environment - air, water, land, food and consumer products.
For your health... The Government of Canada is committed to protecting the environment and the health of Canadians by:
- addressing environmental hazards that are already impacting on the health and quality of life of Canadians
- taking action to ensure that future generations have a safe and healthy environment
